finding: The existing environment contract validator and preflight evidence builder required two separate invocations and an intermediate JSON handoff. A single fail-closed runner now produces both bounded artifacts from committed workflow and requirements inputs.
design_implication: The deployment workflow can invoke one command before secret-bearing readiness probes, retain both the normalized contract and bounded preflight packet, and fail before deployment when repository declarations drift.

covered: matching declarations produce contract and bounded evidence outputs
environment or secret-reference drift fails closed
outputs expose secret names but not credential values

limits: GitHub environment existence is not proven
secret installation or correctness is not proven
deployment and DNS resolution are not proven
scientific or medical claims are not evaluated
falsification_route: invoke the runner against a workflow missing either required secret reference and require a non-zero exit
inspect generated files and reject any credential value material
dispatch the exact-commit workflow only after repository-environment configuration exists
